lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: I initiated a system wide reboot like you said. Did it work?

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Seems so. All the alarms stopped ringing over in my neck of the woods...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Main Control Console seems to be showing good numbers again...

lines.speaker: AI
lines.text: em wide reboot successful. All systems nominal.

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Well, there’s your answer right there.

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Good work, detective. This could have been catastrophic...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Yeah, it could’ve...maybe now I can actually get a good night’s rest...

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Hopeful thinking, Macklin. Until next time...
